case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS VLAMIS ANTHONY

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $718.71 AS TO DEFENDANT VLAMIS ANTHONY
